output.summary: Move .modal-close-btn CSS from resources/css/screen/swiper.css to a new block-specific file blocks/TestimonialsCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel.css. The modal-close-btn CANNOT be fully replaced with Tailwind-only classes because it requires a ::before pseudo-element with animated gradient sweep (background-size: 200% 100%, background-position animation via @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep). The keyframes animation is shared with .carousel-nav-btn and must remain in swiper.css, but can be referenced from the block-specific CSS file since both files are bundled into the same css/screen output by webpack.

fileChanges.description: Create block-specific CSS file containing all .modal-close-btn styles extracted from swiper.css
fileChanges.details: Move lines 96-144 from swiper.css into this new file. This includes: (1) .modal-close-btn base styles with isolation:isolate, (2) .modal-close-btn::before pseudo-element with gradient background using CSS custom properties --gradient-left and --gradient-right, background-size: 200% 100%, background-position: 100% 0, opacity 0, z-index -1, pointer-events: none, transition: opacity 0.3s ease, (3) .modal-close-btn svg sizing, (4) .modal-close-btn:hover:not(:disabled) border/text color change + ::before animation trigger using carousel-nav-gradient-sweep, (5) .modal-close-btn:disabled opacity/cursor, (6) .modal-close-btn:focus-visible ring styles. The @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep stays in swiper.css since it is shared with .carousel-nav-btn. Both files compile into the same css/screen.css bundle via webpack, so the keyframe reference will resolve correctly. Also move the .modal-close-btn::before portion from the @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block.

fileChanges.description: Remove .modal-close-btn styles (lines 96-144) and its reference in the prefers-reduced-motion media query (line 169)
fileChanges.details: Remove: (1) The comment on line 96 '/* Modal Close Button - semantically separate from carousel nav, always white on dark backdrop */', (2) The entire .modal-close-btn rule block (lines 97-108), (3) .modal-close-btn::before (lines 111-122), (4) .modal-close-btn svg (lines 124-127), (5) .modal-close-btn:hover:not(:disabled) (lines 129-131), (6) .modal-close-btn:hover:not(:disabled)::before (lines 133-136), (7) .modal-close-btn:disabled (lines 138-140), (8) .modal-close-btn:focus-visible (lines 142-144). In the @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block at line 162-182, update the selector on line 168-169 from '.carousel-nav-btn::before, .modal-close-btn::before' to just '.carousel-nav-btn::before' since the .modal-close-btn reduced-motion override will move to the block-specific CSS file. Keep the @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep (lines 81-94) in swiper.css since it is shared.

designDecisions.question: Can .modal-close-btn be fully replaced with Tailwind-only classes in the HTML?
designDecisions.recommendation: No. While most base styles (inline-flex, sizing, border, rounded-full, colors, cursor, focus-visible ring, disabled opacity) are Tailwind-expressible, the ::before pseudo-element with animated gradient sweep cannot be done with Tailwind alone. It requires: (1) content: '' with position: absolute inset: 0, (2) linear-gradient background using CSS custom properties --gradient-left/--gradient-right, (3) background-size: 200% 100% with background-position: 100% 0, (4) opacity transition + animation trigger on hover via @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep. Tailwind's before: modifier cannot express the background-size, background-position animation, or reference @keyframes. A custom CSS file is required.

designDecisions.question: Should the @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep be duplicated in the block CSS or kept shared in swiper.css?
designDecisions.recommendation: Keep the @keyframes in swiper.css. Both .carousel-nav-btn (in swiper.css) and .modal-close-btn (in block CSS) reference the same animation. Since webpack bundles both files into the same css/screen.css output, the keyframe definition in swiper.css will be available to the block CSS. Duplicating it would violate DRY and risk animation drift if one copy is updated but not the other.

designDecisions.question: Should the prefers-reduced-motion override for .modal-close-btn::before move to the block CSS or stay in swiper.css?
designDecisions.recommendation: Move it to the block CSS file (TestimonialsCarousel.css) alongside the other .modal-close-btn rules. This keeps all modal-close-btn concerns co-located. The swiper.css reduced-motion block should be updated to only reference .carousel-nav-btn::before. The block CSS file should include its own @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block for .modal-close-btn::before.

output.qaDetails: Verify: (1) Modal close button renders with correct white border and text on dark modal backdrop, (2) Hover state triggers gradient sweep animation, (3) Focus-visible ring appears correctly, (4) prefers-reduced-motion disables the animation, (5) No visual regression on carousel nav buttons (.carousel-nav-btn) which remain in swiper.css, (6) Build compiles without errors
